security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* https:; img-src 'self' data: asset: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Explore and interact with MongrelDB databases
bundle.longDescription: MongrelDB Viewer is a multi-platform Signal Deck for opening local MongrelDB databases, visualizing schemas and AI indexes, running SQL and native retrieval, installing dense ANN (384-d), and chatting via OpenAI-compatible APIs or MCP.
